name: Is Fibermaxxing Safe? Dietitians Support the Trend but Only if You Avoid These Mistakes
summary: Most people are getting fibermaxxing wrong — and they don’t even know it.

name: 5 Reasons the Fibermaxxing Trend Is Making You Feel Worse (and How to Fix Each One)
summary: Fibermaxxing is trending — but doubling your fiber overnight could seriously wreck your gut health.

name: The Financial Maneuvering That Put Cannabis On The NYSE
summary: Historically, cannabis companies operating in the United States have been locked out of one of the most fundamental tools available to American businesses: the ability to list on a major U.S. stock exchange. On June 5, 2026, that changed.

name: Large psilocybin dose briefly improved dementia in case study: What to know
summary: A case study published in Frontiers in Neuroscience is making big waves in the dementia research community.

name: Quantum ‘Fingerprints’ May Be Shaping Your Decisions—And Ultimately Your Free Will, Scientist Says
summary: New research suggests that fleeting quantum forces leave lasting imprints on the brain, subtly influencing thought, intuition, and the choices we make.

name: Nevada GOP Gov. Joe Lombardo projected to face Democrat Aaron Ford in one of this year's most competitive races
summary: Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford, a Democrat, and Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo won their parties' primaries in this year's Nevada gubernatorial race, CBS News projects, setting up the November ballot in one of the races Democrats are targeting.

name: New fossils suggest human evolution was more crowded than scientists thought
summary: New fossil discoveries are reshaping scientists' understanding of a pivotal chapter in human evolution, revealing that several human ancestor lineages lived side by side nearly 3 million years ago.

name: Scientists Say Whitney Houston and Adele Songs May Be Natural Mosquito Repellent—Here’s Why
summary: Studies reveal extreme pitch changes in music confuse bugs and reduce biting attempts.

name: Tesla looking to bring possible 5K robotaxi fleet to Las Vegas area
summary: Tesla Robotaxi filed an application with the Nevada Transportation Authority to bring up to 5,000 robotaxis to Clark County, if approved, they would join the fray of self-driving cars in the valley.
